Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.ArrayRecordReadable

Packages that use ArrayRecordReadable
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5l
JSON5L (JSON5 Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support

  • Uses of ArrayRecordReadable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson that implement ArrayRecordReadable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    BsonParser
    Parses BSON (Binary JSON) into POJO models.
    static class 
    BsonParser.Base64
    Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
    static class 
    BsonParser.SpacedHex
    Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
    class 
    BsonParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of BsonParser.

  • Uses of ArrayRecordReadable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor that implement ArrayRecordReadable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CborParser
    Parses CBOR streams (RFC 8949) into POJO models.
    static class 
    CborParser.Base64
    Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
    static class 
    CborParser.SpacedHex
    Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
    class 
    CborParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of CborParser.

  • Uses of ArrayRecordReadable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.html that implement ArrayRecordReadable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HtmlParser
    Parses text generated by the HtmlSerializer class back into a POJO model.
    class 
    HtmlParserSession
    ContextSession object that lives for the duration of a single use of HtmlParser.

  • Uses of ArrayRecordReadable in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.json that implement ArrayRecordReadable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    JsonParser
    Parses any valid RFC 8259 JSON text into a POJO model.
    class 
    JsonParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of JsonParser.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    Json5Parser
    Parses any valid JSON text into a POJO model.
    class

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack that implement ArrayRecordReadable
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MsgPackParser
    Parses a MessagePack stream into a POJO model.
    static class 
    MsgPackParser.Base64
    Default parser, string input encoded as BASE64.
    static class 
    MsgPackParser.SpacedHex
    Default parser, string input encoded as spaced-hex.
    class 
    MsgPackParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of MsgPackParser.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    ParquetParser
    Parses Apache Parquet binary data into bean collections.

    ParquetParserSession
